title: UNDERWATER ROBOTIC SYSTEM
what: Full-stack architecture and development of an underwater robotic system
Bio-inspired gait behavior and chassis development
how: Compliant materials and subtractive manufacturing for actuator and structural component fabrication
Design for assembly (DFA) across mechanical, electrical, and software subsystems
ROS2-based control software and sensor integration
Automated/Systematic testing procedures across operating and transitioning media
results: Expected: novel gait behavior characterization and robotic architecture validation across fluid media
Ongoing: autonomous gait behavior testing; full-system integration from mechanics to software stack
